ACE | Commands | Config | Backends | Schools

// backends

ACE supports multiple AI coding backends. Set the backend in ace.toml or ace.local.toml with backend = "value". Default: claude.

Config Value Binary Project Dir Instructions File
claude claude .claude CLAUDE.md
opencode opencode .opencode AGENTS.md
codex codex .agents AGENTS.md
droid droid .factory AGENTS.md

// linked folders

ACE symlinks school folders into the project's backend directory. Not all backends support every folder.

Backend skills/ rules/ commands/ agents/
claude yes yes yes yes
opencode yes — yes yes
codex yes — — —
droid yes — yes yes (as droids/)

// trust modes

Trust modes control backend permission prompts. Set with trust = "auto" or trust = "yolo" in ace.local.toml, or use ace auto / ace yolo.

Backend auto yolo CLI Flags
claude yes yes --permission-mode auto / bypassPermissions
opencode — — not supported
codex — — not supported
droid — yes --skip-permissions-unsafe
Droid also supports tiered autonomy via --auto low|medium|high natively, but ACE does not map to these levels yet.

// MCP registration

ACE registers [[mcp]] entries from school.toml into the backend. All entries are remote HTTP endpoints.

Backend Method OAuth
claude CLI: claude mcp add -t http -s user auto on 401
opencode direct write to ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json auto on 401
codex not yet implemented in-session via /mcp
droid CLI: droid mcp add TBD

// readiness check

ACE verifies the backend is authenticated before launching a session.

Backend Check
claude ~/.claude.json exists
opencode ~/.local/share/opencode/auth.json exists and non-empty
codex ~/.codex/auth.json exists, or CODEX_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY set
droid ~/.factory/settings.json exists

// quirks

Backend Notes
claude Default backend. Full feature support. MCP servers registered at user scope (-s user), not project scope.
opencode No CLI for MCP management — ACE writes JSON config directly. OPENCODE_HOME env var overrides default data directory.
codex MCP registration not yet implemented in ACE. Only skills/ folder linked. MCP auth handled inside Codex via /mcp command.
droid agents/ folder symlinked as droids/ (Factory convention). System prompt injection method pending design decision.
PRODIGY9 — GitHub — MIT License
